sb_prompt: DISCUSS CRIME IN AMERICAN CITIES TODAY.  WHAT ARE YOUR CONCERNS AND THE CONCERNS OF THE OTHER CALLER?  WHAT STEPS CAN BE TAKEN TO REDUCE CRIME?
raw_output:
Participants: ParticiantA (PA), ParticipientB (PB)

PA: Hi there, what can I help you with today?

PB: Well, I was hoping to get your thoughts on crime in American cities these days. As someone around my age or older, do you think things are getting better or worse?
 PA: It's definitely an interesting question. My impression is that while overall crime rates may be going down, certain types of crimes seem to be more prevalent than ever before. What's your take on this issue?
